tasks.description: Remove ORCH-001 from orchestrator task generation
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to permanently blacklist ORCH-001 from task generation queue. Add validation to reject any self-referential orchestrator improvement tasks at config level.

tasks.description: Remove QUALITY-001 from quality gate config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts to blacklist QUALITY-001 and prevent quality system from generating self-improvement tasks. Add flag to disable meta-task validation.

tasks.description: Add execution watchdog with cascade failure detection
tasks.context: Add to backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts a watchdog that monitors task rejection rate. If >5 consecutive failures occur, pause queue for 60s and alert. Prevents cascade loops from exhausting capacity.

tasks.description: Implement task complexity validator bypass for critical fixes
tasks.context: Update backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts to allow priority:critical tasks to skip complexity checks during cascade recovery mode. Prevents validator from blocking emergency repairs.
Add function to backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts that tracks completed vs attempted tasks per sprint. Auto-log warning if capacity drops below 5 tasks/sprint for 2 consecutive sprints.
Create test in backend/src/services/settlement/types.test.ts that simulates 5 consecutive task rejections and verifies watchdog triggers pause. Ensures future cascades auto-halt.
